sql.trim: t1.FQ_CRER_DATE_BEGIN, t1.FQ_CRER_DATE_END, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.FQ_TITLE, t1.FQ_TEL, t1.ATTR9, t1.FQ_HDKZ_DATE_BEGIN, t1.FQ_CREA_TIME, t1.ATTR4, t1.ATTR3, t1.ATTR2, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ATTR8, t1.ATTR7, t1.ATTR20, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.ATTR6, t1.FQ_PXSJ, t1.ATTR5, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.ATTR12, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.ATTR13, t1.ATTR10, t1.ATTR11, t1.ATTR16, t1.ATTR17, t1.ATTR14, t1.ATTR15, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.FQ_FROM_NO, t1.ATTR18, t1.ATTR19, t1.FQ_PARTY_TYPE, t1.FQ_USER, t1.VERSION, t1.FQ_HDKZ_DATE_END, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.FQ_PARTY_NAME, t1.FQ_PARTY_ORG,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_XFG_FQ t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_XFG_FQ
FQ_CRER_DATE_BEGIN,
FQ_CRER_DATE_END,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
FQ_TITLE,
FQ_TEL,
ATTR9,
FQ_HDKZ_DATE_BEGIN,
FQ_CREA_TIME,
ATTR4,
ATTR3,
ATTR2,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ATTR8,
ATTR7,
ATTR20,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ATTR6,
FQ_PXSJ,
ATTR5,
CREATED_BY,
ATTR12,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ATTR13,
ATTR10,
ATTR11,
ATTR16,
ATTR17,
ATTR14,
ATTR15,
CREATION_DATE,
FQ_FROM_NO,
ATTR18,
ATTR19,
FQ_PARTY_TYPE,
FQ_USER,
VERSION,
FQ_HDKZ_DATE_END,
ORG_IDENTITY,
FQ_PARTY_NAME,
FQ_PARTY_ORG,
#{fqCrerDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{fqCrerDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{fqTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fqTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fqHdkzDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{fqCreaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fqPxsj,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{fqFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{fqPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fqUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{fqHdkzDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fqPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fqPartyOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_XFG_FQ( FQ_CRER_DATE_BEGIN , FQ_CRER_DATE_END , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , FQ_TITLE , FQ_TEL , ATTR9 , FQ_HDKZ_DATE_BEGIN , FQ_CREA_TIME , ATTR4 , ATTR3 , ATTR2 , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ATTR8 , ATTR7 , ATTR20 , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ATTR6 , FQ_PXSJ , ATTR5 , CREATED_BY , ATTR12 , LAST_UPDATED_BY , ATTR13 , ATTR10 , ATTR11 , ATTR16 , ATTR17 , ATTR14 , ATTR15 , CREATION_DATE , FQ_FROM_NO , ATTR18 , ATTR19 , FQ_PARTY_TYPE , FQ_USER , VERSION , FQ_HDKZ_DATE_END , ORG_IDENTITY , FQ_PARTY_NAME , FQ_PARTY_ORG )
select #{item.fqCrerDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.fqCrerDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.fqTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fqTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fqHdkzDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.fqCreaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fqPxsj,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.fqFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.fqPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fqUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.fqHdkzDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fqPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fqPartyOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_XFG_FQ
FQ_CRER_DATE_BEGIN = #{fqCrerDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
FQ_CRER_DATE_END = #{fqCrerDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
FQ_TITLE = #{fqTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FQ_TEL = #{fqTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FQ_HDKZ_DATE_BEGIN = #{fqHdkzDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
FQ_CREA_TIME = #{fqCreaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FQ_PXSJ = #{fqPxsj,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
FQ_FROM_NO = #{fqFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
FQ_PARTY_TYPE = #{fqPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FQ_USER = #{fqUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
FQ_HDKZ_DATE_END = #{fqHdkzDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FQ_PARTY_NAME = #{fqPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FQ_PARTY_ORG = #{fqPartyOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_XFG_FQ set FQ_CRER_DATE_BEGIN = #{fqCrerDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_CRER_DATE_END = #{fqCrerDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_TITLE = #{fqTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_TEL = #{fqTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_HDKZ_DATE_BEGIN = #{fqHdkzDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_CREA_TIME = #{fqCreaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_PXSJ = #{fqPxsj,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_FROM_NO = #{fqFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_PARTY_TYPE = #{fqPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_USER = #{fqUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , FQ_HDKZ_DATE_END = #{fqHdkzDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_PARTY_NAME = #{fqPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_PARTY_ORG = #{fqPartyOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_XFG_FQ set FQ_CRER_DATE_BEGIN = #{item.fqCrerDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_CRER_DATE_END = #{item.fqCrerDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_TITLE = #{item.fqTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_TEL = #{item.fqTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR9 = #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_HDKZ_DATE_BEGIN = #{item.fqHdkzDateBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_CREA_TIME = #{item.fqCreaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR4 = #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{item.attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_PXSJ = #{item.fqPxsj,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR5 = #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR12 = #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR13 = #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR10 = #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR11 = #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR16 = #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR17 = #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_FROM_NO = #{item.fqFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR18 = #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR19 = #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FQ_PARTY_TYPE = #{item.fqPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_USER = #{item.fqUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , FQ_HDKZ_DATE_END = #{item.fqHdkzDateEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_PARTY_NAME = #{item.fqPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FQ_PARTY_ORG = #{item.fqPartyOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
